computeDecayScore:10k.reason: 10k per-page decay calls at compile time. CI median ~3ms, local ~1ms. 15ms budget keeps a 5x CI headroom while still catching real regressions.

resolveLargeRepoDefaults:100k.reason: 100k large-repo-default resolutions. CI median ~40ms, local ~12ms. 150ms budget keeps a ~4x CI headroom.

redact:20KB-prose.reason: Ingest-time redaction over a 20KB prose buffer. CI median ~0.03ms; variance at this scale is noise. 5ms budget catches order-of-magnitude regressions only.
